title: Reset to Defaults — Complete Coverage Fix
changes: Reset button now removes cp2p_bubble_style from localStorage and calls _applyBubbleStyle('default') — clears the #__bubbleStyleOverride <style> tag so all message bubbles immediately revert to the default gradient in the live chat

Reset button now removes cp2p_chat_bg from localStorage and calls _applyChatBg('default') — clears the #messages background style so the chat area immediately reverts to the default background in the live chat

Added msgTextColor: null to _PROF_DEFAULTS — this profile.json field was previously left untouched by the reset, meaning a custom message text colour would persist after reset; it is now cleared alongside nameColor, avatarRing, statusEmoji and profileAccent
Updated confirmation dialog text to mention 'chat background' as one of the items being reset

Step ordering improved: all local/localStorage state is wiped first (particles, bubble style, chat bg), then cloud writes happen, then propagation and tab reload — prevents a brief moment where localStorage still holds stale values after the cloud write succeeds
